response.global_analysis: The video consists of character dialogue and narration in English with occasional Italian ('Basta'). There is no vocal music, as confirmed by the lack of song metadata in the reference JSON. Subtitles are meticulously timed to vocal onsets and offsets, with splits applied at natural pauses. On-screen text and character names have been integrated to ensure accuracy.
